<div align="center"><sub>ACT I · THE OPENING SHOT · SC. 01</sub></div>

<br>

<p align="center"><i>Aspiring Computer Science student at Nirma University with a habit of turning problems into shippable apps.<br>Built with Java · Spring Boot · Next.js · Django — currently obsessed with making AI a useful collaborator, not a gimmick.</i></p>

<div align="center"><sub>ACT II · THE BODY OF WORK · SC. 02</sub></div>

## § Selected *Works*

<br>

**01 · Reel 01** &nbsp; <sub>Feature · 2026</sub>
### AltiShift
*"One machine, five clouds, zero manual intervention."*

`Python` `Frappe` `Bash` `Node.js` `MySQL`

**Scene Breakdown**
- Bidirectional VM migration pipeline across AWS, GCP, DigitalOcean, CloudStack, and Virtuozzo
- Fully automated transfer using only source/destination API and access keys — no manual steps
- Handles bootloader reinstallation, network reconfiguration, and OS-aware package management across distros
- Live step-by-step migration logging with per-job progress tracking

[Source](https://github.com/Darshtank05) · Live *(add link)*

<br>

**02 · Reel 02** &nbsp; <sub>Feature · 2026</sub>
### WriteVerse
*"A newsroom of strangers, moderated in real-time by a polite machine."*

`Django` `Python` `SQLite 3` `Gemini API` `Brevo SMTP`

**Scene Breakdown**
- Multi-role RBAC for Admins, Managers, and Writers
- Gemini API for real-time toxicity moderation of user comments
- Secure OTP-based auth for registration and password resets via Brevo
- Social engagement: follow system, bookmarking, AJAX-based likes

[Source](https://github.com/DarshTank/django-blog) · Live *(add link)*

<br>

**03 · Reel 03** &nbsp; <sub>Short · 2026</sub>
### Draft AI
*"An invisible assistant slips into your inbox and writes the email you didn't have time for."*

`Java` `Spring Boot` `React` `Chrome Ext (MV3)` `Gemini` `Material UI`

**Scene Breakdown**
- Chrome Extension (Manifest V3) with DOM injection of an AI Reply button into Gmail
- Spring Boot WebFlux backend handling high-concurrency Gemini API requests
- Responsive landing page with dynamic tone-selection modules

[Source](https://github.com/DarshTank/draft-ai) · Live *(add link)*

<br>

**04 · Reel 04** &nbsp; <sub>Mystery · 2025</sub>
### Veil
*"Anonymous, but never reckless. A safer place to say the thing."*

`Next.js` `Tailwind` `NextAuth` `Zod` `Resend` `Gemini` `MongoDB`

**Scene Breakdown**
- AI-powered anonymous messaging using Gemini for safer, smarter exchanges
- OTP verification via Resend Email API to cut down fake signups
- NextAuth + Zod for hardened authentication and schema validation

[Source](https://github.com/DarshTank/Veil-Message) · Live *(add link)*

<br>

<div align="center"><sub>ACT III · THE BACKSTORY · SC. 03</sub></div>

## § Voiceover

*"Aspiring Computer Science student with a strong passion for coding and building real-world applications. I see every challenge as an opportunity to learn, experiment, and create impactful solutions. With hands-on experience in web development and Core Java, I bring energy, curiosity, and a problem-solving mindset to everything I touch."*

— Coding with purpose, learning with passion, growing with every challenge.

📍 Ahmedabad, IN &nbsp;·&nbsp; 🎬 Open to roles &nbsp;·&nbsp; 🎓 CS · 2024–27

<br>

## § Location Shoots

**STP Web Hosting** — *Intern, Software Developer* &nbsp; <sub>May 2026 – Jun 2026 · Rajkot, India</sub>
`Python` `Frappe` `Node.js` `MySQL` `HTML` `CSS`
- Contributed to AltiShift, a cross-cloud migration platform spanning GCP, AWS, DigitalOcean, Virtuozzo, and CloudStack
- Built an automated migration pipeline transferring a client's VM using only source/destination API and access keys
- Ensured migrated VMs replicate the source environment's configuration and runtime state with zero manual intervention

**InfiniteAI** — *Intern, Web Development* &nbsp; <sub>Dec 2023 – Jan 2024 · Rajkot, India</sub>
`HTML` `CSS` `JS` `PHP`
- Built a full-stack job platform with seamless client and admin dashboards
- Integrated OTP email verification, reducing fake registrations by 35%
- Improved website performance by 25% through optimization and debugging

**Technosoft** — *Intern, Web Development* &nbsp; <sub>Apr 2022 – Jun 2022 · Rajkot, India</sub>
`HTML` `CSS` `PHP`
- Optimized website data management, reducing redundant data by 20%
- Contributed to backend (PHP) enhancements, boosting admin efficiency
- Uploaded and structured product data for the company's home decor catalogue

<br>

**Nirma University** — B.Tech, Computer Science & Engineering &nbsp; <sub>Aug 2024 – May 2027 · Ahmedabad, India</sub>
